debug_info.goal:
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
ι : Type u_5
p : ι → NNReal
hp : ∀ (i : ι), p i ≠ 0
f : ι → α → 𝕜
i : ι
s : Finset ι
hi : i ∉ s
ih : s.Nonempty → ∀ (q : NNReal), ∑ i ∈ s, (↑(p i))⁻¹ = (↑q)⁻¹ → ‖∏ i ∈ s, f i‖_[↑q] ≤ ∏ i ∈ s, ‖f i‖_[↑(p i)]
hs✝ : (cons i s hi).Nonempty
q : NNReal
hpq : (↑(p i))⁻¹ + (∑ x ∈ s, (↑(p x))⁻¹)⁻¹⁻¹ = (↑q)⁻¹
hs : s.Nonempty
⊢ (↑(p i))⁻¹ + (↑(∑ i ∈ s, (p i)⁻¹)⁻¹)⁻¹ = (↑q)⁻¹

failed_attempts: by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq
by simpa using hpq
by simp [hpq]
by convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_sum]
by convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv]
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (NNReal.sum_ne_zero.mpr fun j hj => inv_ne_zero (hp j)), ENNReal.coe_sum, inv_inv]; convert hpq using 2; simp

by
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (NNReal.sum_ne_zero.mpr fun j _ => inv_ne_zero (hp j)), inv_inv]
      convert hpq using 2
      rw [ENNReal.coe_sum]
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]
by convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum]
by convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]
by convert hpq using 2 <;> simp [ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv]

by
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (NNReal.sum_ne_zero.mpr fun j hj => inv_ne_zero (hp j))]
      convert hpq using 2
      rw [ENNReal.inv_inv]
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (NNReal.sum_ne_zero.mpr (fun j hj => inv_ne_zero (hp j))), ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq
by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv, inv_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum] at hpq ⊢; exact hpq
by convert hpq using 2 <;> simp [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.inv_inv]
by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq

by
      have hs' : (∑ i ∈ s, (p i)⁻¹) ≠ 0 := Finset.sum_ne_zero_iff.mpr ⟨_, hs.choose_mem, inv_ne_zero.mpr (hp _)⟩
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv hs', inv_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]
      exact hpq
by convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum]
by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum, inv_inv]; exact hpq

by
      convert hpq using 2
      rw [ENNReal.coe_inv, inv_inv]
      · rw [ENNReal.coe_sum]
        congr 1
        ext j
        rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp j)]
      · simp [NNReal.sum_eq_zero_iff, hs.ne_empty, hp]
by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv, ne_eq]; convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_finset_sum]
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (by simp [Finset.sum_eq_zero_iff, hp] : ∑ i ∈ s, (p i)⁻¹ ≠ 0), ENNReal.coe_sum]; convert hpq using 2; simp [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]
by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv]; convert hpq using 2; simp
by simp_rw [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _), ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq

by
      convert hpq using 2
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv, inv_inv]
      rw [ENNReal.coe_sum]
      congr 1
      ext j
      exact ENNReal.coe_inv (hp j)

by
      convert hpq using 2
      rw [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.inv_inv]
      · congr 1
        rw [← ENNReal.coe_finset_sum]
      · exact (Finset.sum_pos (fun j hj => NNReal.inv_pos.mpr (hp j)) hs).ne'

by
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (Finset.sum_ne_zero_of_pos _ fun j _ => inv_pos.mpr (hp j).bot_lt)]
      convert hpq using 2
      simp only [ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]

by convert hpq using 2; rw [ENNReal.coe_inv, inv_inv]; · rw [ENNReal.coe_finset_sum]; congr 1; ext j; exact ENNReal.coe_inv (hp j); · exact Finset.sum_ne_zero_of_ne_zero hs fun j _ => NNReal.inv_ne_zero.mpr (hp j)

by
      convert hpq using 2
      rw [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.inv_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum]
      · simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]
      · exact Finset.sum_ne_zero_iff.mpr ⟨_, hs.choose_spec, inv_ne_zero (hp _)
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum]; exact hpq
by simp only [ENNReal.coe_inv, ENNReal.coe_sum, ENNReal.coe_inv (hp _)]; exact hpq
